content.text:
Embeddings turn text into points in space, so "similar meaning" becomes "close together."

> [!note] The core idea
> A model maps each piece of text to a list of numbers (a vector). Texts about the same topic land near each other — even when they share no words.

You measure closeness with cosine similarity:

$$\cos\theta = \frac{\mathbf{a}\cdot\mathbf{b}}{\lVert \mathbf{a}\rVert\,\lVert \mathbf{b}\rVert}$$

Here's the flow end to end:

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A[Your text] --> B[Embedding model]
  B --> C[Vector]
  C --> D[Nearest notes]
```
